forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+---
+depends_on:
+- 01KXJWN2G2Z6MV4N7RSD96HKPG
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8e80'
+title: 'Integration suite B: edits-OK paths + cross-op flows in isolated directories'
+---
+## What
+Per plan.md ┬º10 task 10 (second half). Reuses suite A's `withIsolatedWorkspace` / `withIsolatedSwiftPackage` helpers and shared warm CodeContext:
+- **Edits-OK paths** (each commits and asserts `diagnostics.status == clean` where applicable):
+  - [ ] clean write of a valid Swift file ÔåÆ `clean`
+  - [ ] each cascade rung against a real file: anchor edit, literal edit, recovered (drifted) edit, `replaceAll`, `occurrence`-disambiguated, multi-pair batch
+  - [ ] error-then-fix round trip: edit breaks the build ÔåÆ diagnostics show it ÔåÆ second edit repairs ÔåÆ `clean`
+  - [ ] non-diagnosable file (`README.md`, `.json`) ÔåÆ `skipped`, CodeContext untouched
+  - [ ] read-only tool (`FileTool.makeReadOnly`) never triggers the bridge
+- **Cross-op flows**: write ÔåÆ read (anchors) ÔåÆ edit-by-anchor ÔåÆ diagnostics; glob ÔåÆ grep ÔåÆ edit; gitignore end-to-end (ignored file invisible to glob/grep but readable by explicit path); concurrency smoke (parallel reads during an edit; concurrent edits to distinct files)
+- Byte-level assertions on encoding/line-ending/permission preservation in the real-workspace setting (CRLF fixture, BOM fixture, executable script)
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] Every listed path runs through full op dispatch in a fresh isolated directory and passes
+- [ ] Documented wall-clock budget for the combined integration tier (suite A + B) in the test file header
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `Tests/FileToolIntegrationTests/EditsOKTests.swift` and `CrossOpFlowTests.swift` ÔÇö the checklists above ARE the test lists
+- [ ] Run `swift test --filter "EditsOKTests|CrossOpFlowTests"` ÔÇö expect: green (or explicit skip without sourcekit-lsp)
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` ÔÇö write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file

 title: 'Integration suite B: edits-OK paths + cross-op flows in isolated directories'
 ---
 ## What
-Per plan.md ┬º10 task 10 (second half). Reuses suite A's `withIsolatedWorkspace` / `withIsolatedSwiftPackage` helpers and shared warm CodeContext:
+Per plan.md ┬º10 task 10 (second half). Reuses suite A's `withIsolatedWorkspace` / `withIsolatedSwiftPackage` helpers, shared warm CodeContext, and the same gating rule (**local: skip cleanly without sourcekit-lsp; CI: missing sourcekit-lsp is a failure, never a skip**):
 - **Edits-OK paths** (each commits and asserts `diagnostics.status == clean` where applicable):
   - [ ] clean write of a valid Swift file ÔåÆ `clean`
   - [ ] each cascade rung against a real file: anchor edit, literal edit, recovered (drifted) edit, `replaceAll`, `occurrence`-disambiguated, multi-pair batch
@@ -18,11 +18,11 @@

 ## Acceptance Criteria
 - [ ] Every listed path runs through full op dispatch in a fresh isolated directory and passes
-- [ ] Documented wall-clock budget for the combined integration tier (suite A + B) in the test file header
+- [ ] Suite green on the macOS 27 CI runner with the no-silent-skip gating; documented wall-clock budget for the combined integration tier (suite A + B) in the test file header

 ## Tests
 - [ ] `Tests/FileToolIntegrationTests/EditsOKTests.swift` and `CrossOpFlowTests.swift` ÔÇö the checklists above ARE the test lists
-- [ ] Run `swift test --filter "EditsOKTests|CrossOpFlowTests"` ÔÇö expect: green (or explicit skip without sourcekit-lsp)
+- [ ] Run `swift test --filter "EditsOKTests|CrossOpFlowTests"` ÔÇö expect: green (or explicit local skip without sourcekit-lsp; CI never skips)

 ## Workflow
 - Use `/tdd` ÔÇö write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file
